About Creative Car Customs

Born from passion. Built on precision. Trusted by thousands.

Our Story

From a Garage Dream to India's Premium Car Care Brand

What started as a passion project in a small Gurgaon garage in 2018 has grown into one of India's most trusted names in car detailing and customization. Our founder, a lifelong car enthusiast, was frustrated by the lack of truly professional, detail-oriented car care in India.

Creative Car Customs was born from a simple belief: every car deserves the same obsessive attention to detail that its owner gives it. We brought international-grade products, certified techniques, and a no-compromise attitude to the Indian market.

Today, we serve car owners across 50+ cities with our revolutionary doorstep service model — bringing the workshop to your driveway, anywhere in India.

8+
Years
What Drives Us

Mission & Vision

Our Mission

To deliver world-class car care experiences that are accessible, convenient, and uncompromising in quality — right at your doorstep, anywhere in India.

Our Vision

To become India's #1 end-to-end car customization and care platform — setting the standard for quality, innovation, and customer experience in the automotive aftermarket.

Why CCC

Why Thousands Choose Us

We don't just service cars — we obsess over them.

Certified Products

We use only internationally certified, professional-grade products from brands like Gtechniq, XPEL, 3M, and Gyeon.

Trained Technicians

Our team undergoes rigorous training and certification. Every technician has 3+ years of hands-on experience.

Doorstep Service

No need to drop off your car. We bring our fully-equipped mobile unit to your home, office, or anywhere you prefer.

Pan-India Coverage

From Delhi to Chennai, Mumbai to Kolkata — we serve 50+ cities across India. Your location is never a barrier.

Warranty Backed

All our protection services come with manufacturer-backed warranties — ceramic coating up to 5 years, PPF up to 10 years.

37 Services

From a basic wash to ECU remapping — we're your one-stop shop for everything car-related. No half-measures.

Our Team

The People Behind CCC

A team of passionate car enthusiasts, certified technicians, and perfectionists.

AV

Amit Verma

Founder & CEO

Car nut since age 10. 12+ years in the automotive aftermarket. Built CCC from a garage to a pan-India brand.

SR

Sneha Reddy

Head of Operations

Logistics wizard. Manages the pan-India doorstep network. Ensures every job is delivered on time, every time.

RJ

Rajesh Joshi

Lead Detailer & Trainer

Gtechniq & XPEL certified. Has detailed 5000+ cars. Trains every CCC technician to his exacting standards.

Ready to Experience the CCC Difference?

Book a consultation and let us show you what true car care looks like.
